question: In the exclusive CNN interview conducted in Tehran on Monday, March 9, 2026, what did Kamal Kharazi, Foreign Policy Advisor to the office of the Supreme Leader of Iran, state regarding the possibility of diplomacy with the United States?

article_title: Exclusive: Iran is ready for a long war with the US and only economic pain will end it, senior official tells CNN | CNN
